sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IURC investigates why energy bills are so high
feed.summary: The Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC) is investigating the high energy bills from CenterPoint Energy, Duke Energy, and three other utility companies. The companies cited rising construction/operating costs and intense weather as reasons for the increased expenses. Representative Alex Burton emphasized the need to invest in cheaper energy forms to lower monthly bills, and both Duke and CenterPoint have started efforts toward bill transparency.

feed.title: Precision Trading with Saratoga Investment Corp 8.125% Notes Due 2027 (SAY) Risk Zones
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily focuses on precision trading strategies for Saratoga Investment Corp's 8.125% Notes Due 2027 (NYSE: SAY). It outlines institutional trading strategies, including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, using AI-generated signals. The article highlights real-time signals, risk-reward ratios, and multi-timeframe analysis available to subscribers.

feed.title: Rimini Street helps firms optimize legacy IT systems
feed.summary: Rimini Street, Inc. helps companies optimize their existing IT systems and prepare them for innovation, especially concerning AI investments. A recent survey revealed that many CFOs are dissatisfied with technology investments due to rising costs and limited flexibility, stemming from a lack of clear strategic roadmaps and inadequate data infrastructure for AI. Rimini Street offers vendor-independent support and advisory services to address these challenges, freeing up funds for strategic initiatives like digital transformation and AI deployment.

feed.title: KeyBanc initiates Reliance Steel stock with Overweight rating
feed.summary: KeyBanc initiated coverage on Reliance Steel & Aluminum (NYSE:RS) with an Overweight rating and a $341 price target, citing stronger pricing momentum. The firm increased its 2026 EBITDA and EPS estimates, forecasting higher volumes and pricing in the first quarter of 2026. This positive outlook comes despite recent downgrades from JPMorgan and BMO Capital due to margin pressures and increased administrative expenses.

feed.title: KeyBanc assumes coverage on Ryerson stock with Sector Weight
feed.summary: KeyBanc has initiated coverage on Ryerson Holding Corp. with a "Sector Weight" rating following its merger with Olympic Steel Inc. The combined entity, now with a market capitalization of $1.09 billion, is projected by KeyBanc to achieve $1.52 billion to $1.58 billion in first-quarter 2026 revenue. Despite a recent earnings miss in Q4 2025, analysts anticipate 74% sales growth and a return to profitability for Ryerson in 2026.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley resumes Constellation Energy stock at overweight on nuclear value
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has resumed coverage of Constellation Energy Corp. (NASDAQ:CEG) with an overweight rating and a price target of $385.00, implying a 30% upside. The firm highlights the company's significant upside potential from its large nuclear fleet, citing benefits like 24x7 clean baseload power, long asset lives, and expansion opportunities. Constellation Energy recently reported strong revenue growth in Q4 and is selling natural gas generation assets as part of a strategic adjustment.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific acquires Clario for nearly $8.9bn
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has completed the acquisition of Clario, a provider of endpoint data solutions for clinical trials, for approximately $8.875 billion in cash. The deal includes additional payments based on Clario's future performance and is expected to contribute positively to Thermo Fisher's operating margin, with significant synergies projected over five years. Clario's platform has supported a large percentage of new drug approvals by the EMA and FDA, integrating trial endpoint data from various sources to enhance drug development.

feed.title: danaher2025annualreport.htm
feed.summary: Danaher's 2025 Annual Report highlights solid financial performance with $24.6 billion in revenue, 2% core revenue growth, and 4.5% adjusted EPS growth. The company generated $5.3 billion in free cash flow, marking its 34th consecutive year of free cash flow exceeding net income, enabling approximately $4 billion returned to shareholders. Strategic priorities for 2026 include accelerating growth, disciplined M&A, operational excellence, and investing in talent and AI capabilities, while the company anticipates higher sales growth in Diagnostics and modest improvement in Life Sciences end markets.

feed.title: Danaher (NYSE: DHR) 2026 proxy outlines governance, pay and $9.9B Masimo deal
feed.summary: Danaher's 2026 proxy statement details upcoming annual meeting proposals, including the election of directors, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, an advisory vote on executive compensation, and approval of amendments to the Omnibus Incentive Plan. The company highlights strong 2025 financial performance with $24.6 billion in sales and outlines its agreement to acquire Masimo Corporation for $9.9 billion. The proxy also emphasizes Danaher's commitment to robust corporate governance practices and a performance-based executive compensation program.

feed.title: Form 8-K CINTAS CORP For: Mar 25
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation filed a Form 8-K with the SEC on March 25, 2026, to announce its financial results for the quarter ended February 28, 2026. A press release detailing these results is furnished as Exhibit 99 to this Current Report and is incorporated by reference. The filing includes signatures from Scott A. Garula, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.

feed.title: Paychex Reports Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX) announced strong third-quarter results for fiscal year 2026, with double-digit revenue and operating income growth, and accelerated organic revenue growth. The company reported total revenue of $1.8 billion, a 20% increase, and diluted earnings per share of $1.56, up 9%. Paychex also returned over $1.5 billion to shareholders year-to-date and updated its fiscal 2026 outlook for interest on funds held for clients.

feed.title: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation reported strong fiscal 2026 third-quarter results, with an 8.9% increase in revenue to $2.84 billion and a diluted EPS of $1.24, up 9.7% year-over-year. The company achieved an all-time high gross margin of 51.0% and announced an agreement to acquire UniFirst Corporation, with expectations for significant shareholder and customer value. Cintas also raised its full fiscal year 2026 financial guidance for revenue and adjusted diluted EPS.

feed.title: Bondholders get 3 more days as IPALCO extends note consent vote
feed.summary: IPALCO Enterprises, Inc. has extended the expiration time for its consent solicitations concerning its 4.25% Senior Notes due 2030 and 5.75% Senior Notes due 2034 to March 27, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. New York City time. As of the previous deadline, approximately 31% of the 2030 Notes and 25% of the 2034 Notes holders had provided consent, falling short of the majority threshold required for the proposed amendments. The company is offering aggregate consent payments of $1,187,500 for the 2030 Notes and $1,000,000 for the 2034 Notes, to be shared by consenting holders if conditions are met.

feed.title: ADOBE, INC. INVESTOR ALERT: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP Investigates Adobe, Inc.’s Directors and Officers for Breach of Fiduciary Duties – ADBE
feed.summary: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP has initiated an investigation into Adobe, Inc.'s directors and officers for potential breaches of fiduciary duties. This comes after a $150 million settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice regarding subscription practices and a U.K. Competition and Markets Authority investigation into cancellation fees. Shareholders are encouraged to join the investigation to explore potential damages suffered by Adobe and its shareholders.

feed.title: AI phone agents get 70 languages as IBM taps ElevenLabs voices
feed.summary: IBM and ElevenLabs announced an integration to bring ElevenLabs' Text to Speech and Speech to Text capabilities to IBM watsonx Orchestrate. This collaboration will provide premium voice quality across 70 languages and over 10,000 voices, empowering secure, scalable agentic AI experiences for various enterprise applications. The integration also includes enterprise protections like PCI compliance, Zero Retention Mode, and HIPAA support, allowing AI agents to communicate naturally and effectively while meeting stringent security and compliance requirements.

feed.title: Freeport to pay investors May 1 with $0.15-a-share dividend
feed.summary: Freeport (NYSE: FCX) has declared a cash dividend of $0.15 per share on its common stock, payable on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026. This dividend comprises a base dividend of $0.075 per share and a variable dividend of $0.075 per share, in line with the company's performance-based payout framework. Freeport is a leading international metals company focused on copper, operating diverse assets with significant reserves in copper, gold, and molybdenum across Indonesia, the U.S., and South America.

feed.title: SLB Expands NVIDIA Partnership To Build AI Infrastructure For Energy
feed.summary: SLB (formerly Schlumberger) has significantly expanded its partnership with NVIDIA to develop advanced AI infrastructure specifically for the energy industry. This collaboration aims to accelerate digital transformation within the energy sector by leveraging AI and machine learning technologies. The initiative will likely focus on optimizing operations, improving efficiency, and driving innovation across various energy exploration and production processes.

feed.title: ADP survey finds only 22% of workers feel job security
feed.summary: An ADP survey revealed that only 22% of global workers feel strong job security, with lower-paid and entry-level employees expressing the greatest concerns. The report also found that frequent AI users showed higher job security confidence, but daily AI users were more likely to feel less productive. ADP stock trades near its 52-week low and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Coca-Cola commits $650m to expand Fairlife dairy production in Michigan
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is investing $650 million to expand its Fairlife dairy production facility in Coopersville, Michigan. This expansion will add 245,000-square-feet, introduce two new production lines, and create about 150 new jobs, strengthening the company's presence in the region. The project also includes a $17 million grant for vital water infrastructure upgrades, benefiting both the facility and local communities.

feed.title: KeyBanc assumes coverage on Nucor stock with Sector Weight rating
feed.summary: KeyBanc has initiated coverage on Nucor Corp. (NUE) with a Sector Weight rating, raising its 2026 EBITDA estimate to $5.40 billion due to anticipated higher steel mill earnings. The firm noted Nucor appears undervalued with a P/E ratio of 21.6 and has consistently raised its dividend for 16 consecutive years. Nucor projected strong first-quarter 2026 EPS and increased earnings across all operating segments, with capital expenditures expected to decrease in fiscal 2026.

feed.title: World Investment Advisors Has $36.48 Million Stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: World Investment Advisors significantly increased its stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) by 24.8% in Q4, now holding 303,136 shares valued at $36.48 million, making it their 27th largest holding. Exxon Mobil recently beat EPS estimates, has a market cap of $688.4 billion, and offers a $4.12 annual dividend. While geopolitical tensions are boosting oil prices and XOM's stock, potential operational damage from a Qatar strike represents a material risk to earnings.

feed.title: Important Notice to Long-Term Shareholders of ASP Isotopes
feed.summary: Grabar Law Office is investigating claims on behalf of long-term shareholders of ASP Isotopes Inc. (NASDAQ: ASPI), Integer Holdings Corp. (NYSE: ITGR), Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH), and Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNO). These investigations concern potential breaches of fiduciary duty and violations of federal securities laws due to alleged materially false and misleading statements or failures to disclose critical information by the companies and their officers. Shareholders who purchased before specific dates are encouraged to contact Grabar Law Office for potential corporate reforms and financial recovery at no personal cost.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Grows Stake in Texas Pacific Land Corporation $TPL
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) by 845% in Q4, holding 18,900 shares valued at $5.428 million. The article notes mixed insider activity, with a director buying shares and a CAO selling. Texas Pacific Land also reported strong quarterly earnings, raised its dividend, and received an increased price target from KeyCorp.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Has $5.72 Million Stake in Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC increased its stake in Targa Resources, Inc. (NYSE:TRGP) by 24.0% in Q4, acquiring an additional 6,000 shares to own a total of 31,000 shares valued at $5.72 million. Analysts are largely bullish on TRGP, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $252.57, despite recent insider selling of over 100,000 shares. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.00 per share.

feed.title: ARM (NASDAQ:ARM) Stock Rating Upgraded by Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has upgraded ARM (NASDAQ:ARM) from "market perform" to "outperform," setting a new price target of $166, which suggests a 23% upside. This upgrade follows ARM's announcement of its first Arm-designed data-center CPU, the AGI CPU, with Meta as the initial customer, and projections of $15 billion in annual revenue from this product line by the early 2030s. The article also details ARM's recent financial performance, institutional trading activity, and a summary of recent analyst ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Pool Corporation Fell 38% Last Year. Is There a Room For Rebound in 2026?
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) stock declined significantly in 2025 but showed gross margin expansion due to pricing discipline. While Q4 2025 earnings missed estimates, management is optimistic about a rebound in 2026 driven by a variable speed pump replacement cycle, shareholder returns, and the digital ordering platform POOL360 Unlocked. Analysts are cautious, awaiting Q1 2026 results to confirm revenue growth, but TIKR's model suggests a potential 49.6% total return by December 2030 based on moderate revenue growth and margin recovery.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Increases Position in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) by 55.6% in the fourth quarter, now holding 28,000 shares valued at approximately $4.01 million. This increase in institutional ownership comes despite recent substantial insider selling, with CEO Gary A. Coombe selling shares worth $5.86 million and other insiders collectively selling $55.46 million over three months. Analysts currently rate PG as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $168.33, and the company offers an annualized dividend of $4.23, yielding about 3.0%.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Sells 32,000 Shares of Citigroup Inc. $C
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC reduced its stake in Citigroup Inc. by 24.6%, selling 32,000 shares and now holding 98,000 shares worth $11.436 million. This makes Citigroup the 22nd largest position in their portfolio, representing 1.3%. The article also highlights that Citigroup exceeded earnings estimates but missed revenue expectations, and an insider recently sold a significant portion of their shares.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. $MO Shares Acquired by Viking Fund Management LLC
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC increased its stake in Altria Group (MO) by 14.1% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 202,000 shares valued at approximately $11.65 million. This makes Altria the 20th largest holding for the fund. In other news, an Altria SVP sold a significant number of shares, while various other hedge funds also adjusted their positions in the company.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Sells 105,000 Shares of Kenvue Inc. $KVUE
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC reduced its stake in Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) by 17.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 105,000 shares and retaining 500,000 shares valued at $8.625 million. Kenvue exceeded Q4 earnings estimates with an EPS of $0.27 and revenue of $3.78 billion, and offers a quarterly dividend of $0.2075, resulting in a 4.7% yield. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating for KVUE, with an average price target of $19.58.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Invests $2.40 Million in Williams Companies, Inc. (The) $WMB
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC recently acquired 40,000 shares of Williams Companies, Inc. for approximately $2.40 million. This comes as several analysts have raised price targets and maintained "buy" or "overweight" ratings for WMB, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The company also increased its quarterly dividend, though insiders have sold a significant amount of shares.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Increases Stock Position in Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company $HPE
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) by 22.5% in Q4, making it their 19th largest holding. This comes as HPE reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and declared a dividend. However, the planned ~$14B Juniper acquisition faces regulatory scrutiny, posing potential risks to HPE's valuation.

feed.title: American Express refreshes business card line with eight new, enhanced features, including AI (AXP:NYSE)
feed.summary: American Express has launched new and enhanced business card features, including the Graphite Business Cash Unlimited card and a Corporate Cash Back Card, to retain and attract business customers. The updates include eight new products aimed at simplifying financial operations, such as credit for accounts payable automation and AI-powered insights. AmEx is also integrating artificial intelligence with a $300 ChatGPT Business credit and an AI-driven expense app for better spend management.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Decreases Holdings in Xcel Energy Inc. $XEL
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC reduced its stake in Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) by 13.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 30,000 shares to hold 190,000 shares valued at approximately $14.03 million. Despite several analysts lowering their price targets for Xcel Energy, the consensus rating remains a "Buy" with an average price target of $88.44. Xcel Energy also recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.5925 per share, offering a 3.0% yield.

feed.title: Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Earns Buy Rating from HC Wainwright
feed.summary: HC Wainwright has reiterated a "Buy" rating for Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY), setting a price target of $135, which suggests a 49% upside. While analysts are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target of $103.44, the biopharmaceutical company recently reported strong revenue growth, exceeding expectations despite an EPS miss. Incyte is trading around $90.62, with a market cap of $18.0 billion and a P/E ratio of 14.14.

feed.title: Dominion Energy Inc stock advances amid offshore wind milestone and analyst upgrades in utility sect
feed.summary: Dominion Energy Inc's stock is advancing on the NYSE due to its Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project reaching over 70% completion with the first turbine operational, driven by increasing power demand from data centers and AI. Analysts maintain a "Hold"-leaning consensus with a modest upside, citing the company's stable dividend profile and regulated returns. The company is positioned as a defensive play for investors seeking yield and long-term growth in the utility sector.

feed.title: Bellway's (BWY) Sector perform Rating Reaffirmed at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reaffirmed its "sector perform" rating for Bellway (LON:BWY), setting a price target of GBX 3,150, which implies a potential upside of 68.6% from its previous close. This rating aligns with the analyst consensus of a "Moderate Buy" for Bellway, with an average target price of GBX 3,212.50. The article also details other recent analyst reports and key financial metrics for Bellway, including its market capitalization, P/E ratio, and recent EPS.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Has Lowered Expectations for Mobico Group (LON:MCG) Stock Price
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reduced its target price for Mobico Group (LON:MCG) from GBX 30 to GBX 25, while maintaining a "sector perform" rating, indicating a potential upside of approximately 28%. Other analysts are also cautious, with Berenberg Bank reaffirming a "hold" rating and a GBX 35 target, and the overall consensus being a "Hold" with an average target of GBX 30. Mobico shares are currently trading near their 12-month low at around GBX 19.50, reflecting continued weak profitability with a reported negative quarterly EPS of GBX -19.20 and a negative net margin.

feed.title: Viking Fund Management LLC Acquires 70,000 Shares of AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Viking Fund Management LLC increased its stake in AT&T Inc. by 16.5%, purchasing an additional 70,000 shares to bring its total holdings to 495,000 shares valued at approximately $12.30 million. This makes AT&T the 18th-largest position in Viking Fund Management LLC's portfolio. The acquisition comes as AT&T maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, with a target price of $30.46, following an earnings beat and favorable FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Expeditors International releases 10th sustainability report detailing 2025 progress
feed.summary: Expeditors International has released its 10th Sustainability Report, offering insights into its environmental and social initiatives and detailing progress made in 2025. The report highlights how the company integrates sustainability objectives into its daily operations and updates stakeholders on its commitment to responsible business practices. This release comes as Expeditors navigates ongoing shipping delays due to Middle East tensions and actively communicates supply chain impacts to clients.

feed.title: Job Insecurity
feed.summary: This article introduces the latest issue of ADP's "Today at Work" quarterly report, which draws on ADP payroll data from over 25 million U.S. workers and extensive global surveys. The current issue focuses on critical workplace topics such as job security, the impact of AI in the workplace, unpaid working hours, and employee engagement. Readers are encouraged to download the full report to gain insights into these contemporary workforce challenges and trends.

feed.title: Why AI users feel safer at work while others fear job loss
feed.summary: ADP Research's "Today at Work 2026, Issue 1" report reveals that only 22% of global workers are confident their job is safe from elimination, despite low unemployment. The study, based on a survey of over 39,000 workers, also highlights that daily AI users are significantly more engaged (30%) compared to non-users (14%) and feel more secure in their jobs. The findings underscore the importance of talent strategies focusing on skills development, mentorship, and clear expectations to boost employee engagement and confidence, especially in an era of rapid AI integration and multi-generational workforces.

feed.title: Quiet hurricane year helped U.S. insurers post a $63 billion gain
feed.summary: U.S. property/casualty insurers achieved an estimated $63 billion net underwriting gain in 2025, a significant improvement from previous years, largely due to unusually low catastrophe losses, particularly a near 90% decline in hurricane-related claims. Despite this gain, net income after taxes declined by $21 billion to $148 billion, primarily due to reduced realized capital gains, and persistent challenges like commercial liability and legal system abuse continue to temper the industry's overall performance. Verisk and APCIA emphasize that this strong performance was a "reset" rather than a "new normal," with continuous inflation, demographic shifts, and natural disaster severity posing ongoing pressures for 2026 and beyond.

feed.title: Strong 2025 Underwriting Income Masks Persistent Property/Casualty Insurance Pressures
feed.summary: Verisk and APCIA reported a significant improvement in the U.S. P&C insurance industry's underwriting gain in 2025, reaching $63 billion, largely due to unusually low catastrophe losses, particularly a near 90% decline in hurricane-related claims. While personal auto showed core improvements and workers' compensation remained favorable, the report cautions that this strong performance is not a "new normal" and persistent pressures such as escalating costs, natural disaster severity, and legal system abuse continue to challenge the industry. Underwriting discipline remains critical as these risks evolve beyond 2025.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific and SHL Medical Collaborate to Deliver Fully Integrated Drug-Device Solutions
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific and SHL Medical have entered a strategic collaboration and expanded capacity at Thermo Fisher's Ridgefield, NJ site to offer fully integrated drug-device solutions in the U.S. This partnership will combine sterile fill-finish manufacturing with SHL Medical's Molly® autoinjector platform, device final assembly, and packaging. The initiative aims to simplify supply chains, accelerate timelines, and address the growing demand for patient-centric, self-administered injectable therapies.

feed.title: Rentokil Initial (RTO) releases 2025 Annual Report and sets 2026 AGM
feed.summary: Rentokil Initial plc has released its Annual Report and Financial Statements for the year ended December 31, 2025, along with the Notice of the 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM) and Proxy Form. These documents have been filed with the UK Financial Conduct Authority and the US Securities and Exchange Commission, and are available on the company's website. The 2026 AGM is scheduled for May 7, 2026, at 2:00 PM at the company's offices in Crawley.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Introduces Isolated Power Modules to Enhance Efficiency and Power Density
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TI) has launched new isolated power modules, UCC34141-Q1 and UCC33420, featuring proprietary IsoShield technology to boost efficiency, safety, and power density in demanding applications like data centers and electric vehicles. These modules integrate a planar transformer with an isolated power stage, reducing solution size by up to 70% and delivering up to 2 watts of power. TI is showcasing these innovations at APEC 2026, reinforcing its commitment to advancing power management technologies.

feed.title: Blackrock boss warns of ‘stark global recession’ if oil prices hit $150 due to Iran war
feed.summary: Larry Fink, BlackRock's co-founder, warned that a sustained increase in oil prices to $150 due to the Iran conflict would lead to a "stark and steep recession," disproportionately affecting the poor. He emphasized that elevated energy costs would have profound economic implications, potentially leading to fuel and food price hikes in the UK. However, Fink also noted that oil prices could fall if Iran re-engaged with international relations, and he dismissed any comparison to the 2008 financial crisis.

feed.title: Rocket Lab (RKLB) Up or Down on March 26? Trading Odds & Predictions (Mar. 26, 2026)
feed.summary: This article details a prediction market on Polymarket regarding whether Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (RKLB) stock will close "Up" or "Down" on March 26, 2026, compared to its previous trading day's close. It outlines the specific resolution criteria, including how closing prices are determined using Pyth data, handling of equal prices, and corporate actions. The market opened on March 25, 2026, and is expected to resolve at noon ET on March 26, 2026, with current odds for "Up" at 57%.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Sells 2,143,380 Shares of Transocean Ltd. $RIG
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL significantly reduced its stake in Transocean Ltd. (NYSE:RIG) by 50.2% in Q3, selling over 2.1 million shares, now owning 2,124,988 shares valued at $6.63 million. This comes as company insiders have also sold 159,903 shares in the last quarter. Analysts maintain a "Reduce" consensus rating with a target price of $6.38, following Transocean's recent earnings which missed EPS estimates but beat revenue expectations.
